# MLYNfit

MLYNfit is a boutique fitness club located in a restored historic mill building in Garbow, Poland, near Lublin. The club combines a gym, group fitness classes, professional trainers, modern equipment, local community atmosphere, and the character of historic industrial architecture.

## Key pages

- Home: https://mlynfit.pl/
- Current schedule: https://mlynfit.pl/terminarz/
- FAQ: https://mlynfit.pl/faq/
- Membership continuation discount: https://mlynfit.pl/kontynuacja-karnetu/
- Offer for companies: https://mlynfit.pl/dla-firm/
- Club rules: https://mlynfit.pl/regulamin/

## Contact

- Address: ul. Mlynska 1A, 21-080 Garbow, Poland
- Phone: +48 798 090 686
- Email: kontakt@mlynfit.pl
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Mlynfit-1872843473022821/

## Useful facts

- Location: Garbow, near Lublin, Poland
- Club type: boutique fitness club, gym, group fitness classes
- Setting: restored historic mill building
- Facilities: training area, group classes, modern gym equipment, free parking
- Opening hours: Monday-Friday 8:00-22:00, Saturday 9:00-18:00, Sunday 9:00-16:00
